invariants: The affine log-ratio ceiling remains an open zeta-specific all-k theorem.
Repaired k300 evidence is finite stress evidence only.
The nonlinear raw-log upper wall is weaker than the affine ceiling.
The companion monotone-contraction upper side remains a separate open theorem target.
Generic moment positivity, endpoint PF, RH, Laguerre-Polya membership, and Lambda <= 0 are forbidden as inputs.

matrix_rows.claim: Set p_k=log(R_k), delta_k=p_(k+1)-p_k, h_k=log((2*k+1)/(2*k-1)), B_k=h_k-p_k, and C_k=(2*k+1)*B_k.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact change of variables only; no zeta inequality is proved.

matrix_rows.claim: The scaled-curvature monotonicity target C_(k+1)>=C_k is exactly an affine upper ceiling for delta_k.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact algebraic equivalence only; the affine ceiling remains open for all k.

matrix_rows.claim: On the raw upper wall B_k>=0, the affine scaled-curvature ceiling is stronger than the nonlinear raw-log upper corridor wall.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact sufficient comparison only; it does not prove the affine ceiling for zeta coefficients.

matrix_rows.claim: The repaired k300 data validate the p-wall, affine scaled-curvature ceiling, lower log wall, and scaled log corridor on all checked rows.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Finite repaired stress evidence only; not an all-k affine log-ceiling theorem.

matrix_rows.claim: The affine ceiling is very close to the nonlinear raw-log upper wall at the high-k edge, so a promoted proof needs sharp constants.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Finite sharpness diagnostic only; not an asymptotic theorem.

matrix_rows.claim: A sufficient log-recurrence target is lower_log_bound(k)<=delta_k<=scaled_ceiling(k,p_k), plus the p-wall and the companion B-monotone upper side.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Open dependency only; it is not a substitute for the companion monotone-contraction theorem.

matrix_rows.claim: A zeta-specific proof may target the affine delta ceiling directly as a log-ratio recurrence after a finite collar.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Live theorem-search route only; no all-k affine recurrence is proved here.

matrix_rows.claim: A promoted proof must state the tail start, lambda range, finite collar, p-wall, lower log wall, affine ceiling, companion B-monotone side, and forbidden assumptions.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Proof-hygiene gate only; not a proof of scaled-curvature monotonicity, raw-corridor occupancy, cone entry, jwpf_06, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

proof_boundary: Exact finite theorem-search diagnostic only. It rewrites scaled-curvature monotonicity as an affine log-ratio ceiling and checks repaired k300 evidence, but it does not prove the all-k affine recurrence, does not prove the companion monotone-contraction theorem, does not prove cone entry, and does not prove RH or Lambda <= 0.

summary.main_finding: Scaled-curvature monotonicity is exactly equivalent to the affine log-ratio ceiling delta_k<=h_(k+1)-((2*k+1)/(2*k+3))*h_k-2*p_k/(2*k+3). On repaired k300 data the p-wall holds on 897/897 rows, the affine ceiling holds on 894/894 adjacent rows, and the ceiling is stronger than the nonlinear raw-log upper wall on 894/894 rows.
